form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last preparation third of 9 at this track November 13 over 1600m, soft track; 3.5 len behind Arctic Bay carrying 58kg at $46. On debut fourth of 12 at Clairefontaine October 21 over 1400m, soft track; 4.5 len behind Tissimo with 56kg at $49. Likely improver who can start this prep in a strong way.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Resuming after a five months break. form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 36-day let-up. First-up after four months ran on strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 9 at this track on March 6 over 1800m, slow going 2.5 len behind New Connection carrying 58kg at $4.40. Previously second-up settled back and ran on when 5th of 9 at Saint-Cloud on November 14 over 2000m, 6 len behind Entlebuch with 58kg at $2.60. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 37-day let-up. Last start 12th of 14 at Saint-Cloud on March 5 over 1600m, on a slow track; 11 len behind Square D'anvers carrying 55kg at $23. Before that 2nd of 10 at Cagnes-sur-Mer on February 2 over 1500m, 5.5 len behind Queen Mekhtaal carrying 58kg at $55. Can't see her figuring in the finish.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start 4th of 14 at La Teste De Buch on March 21 over 1600m, on a slow track; 2.5 len behind Persis with 58kg at $5.10. The run before that 4th of 8 at Chantilly All Weather on February 27 over 1900m, 4.5 len behind Turbulente carrying 58kg at $11. Not far away last time. Finds a nice race this time and is expected to go very well.
